producing_process: project-architect (PI) narrative-arc honesty review (prose; no data/figure owed)
request_origin: selements.website repo — story-editor narrative-arc honesty review questionnaire (Groups A-G)
deliverable_type: prose advice (PI scientific + honesty sign-off); NOT a data export
source_documents: experiments/nerf/design/D73_project_diagnosis_v2.md §3a honest gaps, §4 scope-lock, §5 ξ table + P_F para, §6 dispositions
verb_ceiling: [D-37] honest-reporting + [D-73] close-out. Claim-bearing: every number/framing verified first-hand against am-9/am-10 (R26/R30).
honest_caveat: PI sign-off = APPROVE-WITH-BINDING-CORRECTIONS on selements' drafted arc. Boundary: critique only, no rewrite; scientific corrections binding, storytelling input. Load-bearing caveats the narrative MUST carry: the K2 4x margin includes integrator-induced slack (0.0101 is OUR FGPA-vs-RT error, not physical); '~25%' is ceiling-relative under a DEMOTED ξ estimator (vs 0.0298, never vs 0.6); grid-vs-MLP P_F magnitudes (0.0352 vs 0.4155) are NOT a same-config contrast (n_rays 1024 vs 64) though PASS/FAIL verdicts are; under-constraint is scoped to z=0.3 under this forward model (NOT 'information, not model'; NOT a claim about nature; NOT 'tomography impossible'). MLP fails 2 of 3 gates (3D ξ never evaluated on MLP). Single realization, Sherwood P1, 60 cMpc/h box, fixed cosmology.
